title: July 12th
description: A three-note practice artifact moving through yoga-teacher judgment and correction, a question about talking through the past, and the surprise of a basic left hook becoming novel.

motifMap.meaning: A judgment about embodied instruction is immediately revised, showing the observation correcting itself in public.
The second note turns the attention back toward why old material is surfacing now.
A basic movement becomes newly impactful through timing and surprise.

excerpt: I have yet to have a really great male yoga teacher. [correction I've had very good ones.]

editHistory.notes: Manual live RSS extraction performed with user permission. Classified from the actual post text as Desert Faith with Motion and Methodic Self-Watching because the post joins embodied practice, revision of judgment, past-oriented self-inquiry, and the novelty of basic physical movement.

integrity.notes: Filename: 2026-07-12.july-12th.phase-desert-faith.variant-motion.subcurrent-methodic-self-watching.metadata.v2.6.5.json. Body fingerprint validates against work/live-run/july-12th.source.txt.
